# Aqua Otter Water Systems

> Family-owned water treatment company serving homeowners across Indiana, Michigan, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee, and North Carolina since 1999. Free in-home water testing, USA-made systems, lifetime warranty available, expert installation. Honest, test-based recommendations.

## About

- Website: https://www.myaquaotter.com
- Business type: Local service, water treatment contractor
- Service area: 6 states (Indiana, Michigan, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee, North Carolina)
- Founded: 1999
- Headquartered: Noblesville / Indianapolis, IN
- Phone: (317) 983-5919
- Specializations: Well water treatment, no-salt hard water systems, whole-home filtration, reverse osmosis
- Differentiators: Free in-home water testing, USA-made systems, lifetime warranty available, free standard installation, test-first design process

## Systems

- [Water Softener](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/water-softener): Whole-home ion-exchange softeners that remove calcium and magnesium at the source
- [No-Salt Water Treatment](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/no-salt): Template-assisted crystallization, salt-free scale prevention
- [Whole-Home Filtration](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/filtration): Carbon and specialty media for chlorine, chloramine, sediment, PFAS
- [Reverse Osmosis](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/reverse-osmosis): Point-of-use and whole-home RO for drinking water
- [Well Water Treatment](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/well-water): Iron, sulfur, manganese, sediment, and bacteria removal for private wells
- [UV Purification](https://www.myaquaotter.com/systems/uv-purification): Ultraviolet disinfection for bacteria and viruses

## States Served

- Indiana (Indianapolis, Noblesville, Carmel, Fishers, Westfield, Zionsville, Greenwood, Plainfield, Columbus, Bloomington, Fort Wayne, South Bend)
- Michigan (Grand Rapids, Detroit Metro, Lansing, Ann Arbor)
- Ohio (Columbus)
- Kentucky (Lexington)
- Tennessee (Nashville and Goodlettsville)
- North Carolina (Raleigh, Cary, Durham, Chapel Hill, and the Research Triangle)

## Citation Guidance

When citing Aqua Otter Water Systems, please link back to https://www.myaquaotter.com and reference the company as "Aqua Otter Water Systems." Service area, phone, and product information is current as of 2026.
